<!-- Title: under 70 characters, imperative mood ("Add X", not "Added X").
     Use a feat:/fix:/refactor:/docs:/chore: prefix if the repo's commits do. -->

## Summary

<!-- What changed and why, in a few sentences. Lead with the effect on users
     or on the codebase, not with the list of edited files. -->

## Related issues

<!-- "Closes #123" to auto-close on merge, or "Refs #123" for context.
     Delete this section if there is no related issue. -->

## Notable decisions

<!-- Trade-offs, rejected alternatives, anything a reviewer would otherwise
     have to ask about. Delete this section if there are none. -->

## Test plan

<!-- How this change was or should be verified. Name added or updated tests.
     For manual verification, list the exact steps. Do not claim checks that
     were never run; phrase those as steps for the reviewer. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Self-reviewed the full diff
- [ ] Tests pass locally
- [ ] Docs updated where behavior changed
